Large with box batch YSL|LOU LOU Suede Chain Shoulder Bag|||Loulou_Black Brown Suede
The bag perfect for winter is here, coming to you with warmth! The outer layer has a light suede texture that is super soft and comfortable, offering a premium feel right from the start!
With gold vintage hardware, the whole bag has more character! The interior features a compartment for convenient organization. Most importantly, it is very lightweight for personal use, making it absolutely qualified as a daily commuter bag!
Large size 31x21x10

LE 87 Lambskin Metal Clasp Bag

Equipped with a chain top handle that can be folded down, and a detachable shoulder strap! Suitable for day and night!
Don't miss out 😎

items.name_cn:
LE5 À 7 BABY Soft Suede
The BABY version of the fine suede deer leather handbag. Leather buckle closure. This handbag has a soft structure, paired with a matching suede lining, lightweight and graceful. It features an internal card holder and comes with an adjustable shoulder strap, suitable for both hand-carry and shoulder-wear~ For a light and small bag in summer, this is the top choice!
Size: 15×16x7CM
Style: 809461

items.name_cn:
Light earth yellow·
CALYPSO_ Sheepskin Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian sheepskin, it feels soft and delicate. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic four-clasp closure for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables. With no extra interior pockets, it offers a carefree and spontaneous feel!
Size: 26×14×7cm
Model: 734153

items.name_cn:
Light Green·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A must-have hot seller that has conquered the entire fashion world upon release. Nostalgic Left Bank, inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag features original factory patent leather cowhide, with excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top-half opening clasp completely redefines your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim in amazement—bags can actually open like this, simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm
